meaning: n.滴答响的东西,[无]断续器
examples: They look at the stock ticker to see where the stock price is.
AT&T's ticker symbol on the New York Stock Exchange will remain T.
A half million people watched the troops march in New York's ticker tape parade.
It is a proud name, and NYSE ticker symbols do not identify the company to customers.
It went public that September, with the ticker THIN, by merging with a shell company.
